title: Add LilyGO LICHEN gateway/app overlays
description: Why this exists: the board target alone is not enough; LICHEN apps need overlays and config fragments that bind the selected board capabilities to gateway/native-client firmware. What needs to be done: add app-specific overlay and conf files for the selected LilyGO target, enabling LICHEN L2 packet path, LoRa driver, BLE or serial local interface, logging, shell/diagnostics as appropriate, and HAL capability discovery. Acceptance criteria: gateway/native firmware builds for the LilyGO target; generated config confirms expected LICHEN, radio, BLE/serial, and HAL settings; optional peripherals are disabled or stubbed until validated; memory usage is recorded.
